e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Software Architect
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Designing rollback netcode and an authoritative server with anti-cheat validation requires system-level architectural decisions that cut across every other layer of the project

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Game Designer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: BladeParry's core identity is its parry/posture combat system — balance across classes, hitbox tuning, and combo design require a dedicated systems designer before any C++ implementation begins

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Studio Producer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: PS5 TRC certification, Steam and Epic store submissions, and multi-platform simultaneous release require a senior producer who understands first-party certification processes and can coordinate across engineering, QA, and platform stakeholders

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Technical Artist
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Motion Matching integration with combat state machines, Niagara VFX budgeting, and Nanite/Lumen optimization for 60 FPS on PS5 all require a UE5-fluent technical artist bridging art and engine performance

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Game Audio Engineer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: MetaSounds is a node-based procedural audio graph system unique to UE5; a game audio engineer with engine-level audio integration experience is needed to wire combat state to adaptive sound output

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: UI Designer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: UMG widget design for a fast-paced arena game demands a UI designer who can deliver legible, low-visual-noise combat HUD components that read clearly at 60+ FPS under motion

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Backend Architect
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Redis session state for in-flight matches, matchmaking queue logic, and the authoritative game server's trusted state model require a backend architect experienced with low-latency, stateful server design

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Database Optimizer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Player progression and match data schemas for a live-service arena game require careful indexing and partitioning strategies to support real-time leaderboard queries and post-match write bursts

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: DevOps Automator
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: AWS GameLift fleet scaling, PS5 SDK build integration in CI, and automated multi-platform packaging pipelines require a DevOps engineer experienced with game build infrastructure

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Security Engineer
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: A competitive arena game is a high-value cheating target; server-authoritative validation logic and detection of client-side manipulation must be designed by a security engineer from day one

e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.name: Performance Benchmarker
e3ad622f-987b-46ef-9114-b5c195047b05.role: Explicit 60 FPS targets across three platforms with Lumen global illumination enabled require systematic performance benchmarking against platform-specific hardware budgets throughout development

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Software Architect
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: UE5 C++ architecture for deterministic parry-window timing, rollback networking, and a prioritized replication graph requires the kind of systems-level design expertise this agent provides across authoritative server and client prediction layers.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Game Designer
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: GDD authorship, ability tree balancing, and economy design for a class-based arena fighter with a Battle Pass are core Game Designer outputs — player psychology and economy balancing are explicitly listed in its capabilities.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Technical Artist
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: This agent masters VFX systems, LOD pipelines, and performance budgeting across engines — directly mapping to Niagara combat VFX authoring, Motion Matching rig setup, and Nanite/Lumen performance tuning under real-time combat load.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Game Audio Engineer
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: MetaSounds is UE5's node-based procedural audio graph; this agent's interactive audio and adaptive music specialization maps directly to wiring MetaSounds graphs for hit feedback, parry clangs, and stamina-driven audio states.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: UI Designer
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: Combat HUDs in arena fighters are performance-critical UI systems — this agent's component library and pixel-perfect design capabilities translate directly to UMG widget design for time-sensitive readouts like parry windows and stamina.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Backend Architect
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: AWS GameLift fleet orchestration, matchmaking queue design, and Redis-backed session management are squarely in this agent's scalable system design and cloud infrastructure capabilities.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Database Optimizer
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: Player progression schemas with ranked ladder data, cosmetic ownership, and Battle Pass state require careful indexing and query optimization — this agent specializes in PostgreSQL schema design and performance tuning.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: DevOps Automator
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: Multi-platform Unreal Engine build pipelines (including console targets like PlayStation) with Docker-based server packaging require the infrastructure automation and CI/CD pipeline expertise this agent provides.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Security Engineer
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: Server-side anti-cheat in a competitive arena game requires threat modeling and validation logic design — this agent's secure architecture and vulnerability assessment capabilities apply directly to detecting client manipulation of hitbox and timing data.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Performance Benchmarker
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: Sustaining 60 FPS under Nanite/Lumen with active Niagara VFX and networked replication requires systematic performance profiling and regression tracking — this agent's benchmarking and capacity assessment capabilities close the loop on optimization work.

36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.name: Senior Project Manager
36bc6ebd-2d43-4e10-8de2-abc47388e919.role: A game spanning C++ gameplay, networking, backend infrastructure, VFX, audio, and CI/CD across multiple platforms requires a project manager who converts specs into tracked tasks and maintains realistic scope boundaries.

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Software Architect
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Designing the KMM/native boundary, availability engine, and WebSocket sync protocol across three platforms requires upfront architectural decisions that prevent costly rewrites later

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Product Manager
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Coordinating a multi-platform product with booking, payment, and B2B portal features across iOS, Android, and backend teams requires a dedicated PM to own roadmap and trade-off decisions

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Mobile App Builder
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Directly covers Ktor 3.1, Koin 4.0, Room 2.7, Coil, Kingfisher, and KMM shared layer — the core of the client-side stack across iOS and Android

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: .NET Architect
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Specializes in C#, ASP.NET Core, and Dapper — the exact backend stack — and can own the complex booking availability logic, payment webhook handling, and Quartz job scheduling

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Database Optimizer
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Availability queries with time-slot intersection and geospatial search require specialized PostgreSQL indexing strategies (GiST, partial indexes) that go beyond what the .NET architect will prioritize

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: .NET API Security
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Covers the exact auth stack: OAuth/OIDC for Google/Apple, JWT bearer tokens with refresh rotation, and passkeys/WebAuthn for biometrics — all within the ASP.NET Core identity pipeline

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: DevOps Automator
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Azure Pipelines with Fastlane lanes for iOS and Android requires pipeline expertise to handle code signing, provisioning profiles, and multi-target Gradle builds reliably

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: API Tester
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Payment and booking endpoints have strict correctness requirements — incorrect availability or double-booking logic must be caught before production, requiring dedicated API test coverage

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Accessibility Auditor
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Dynamic Type support on iOS 18 and WCAG compliance across 5 locales requires systematic screen-reader testing that developers rarely cover adequately during feature development

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Performance Benchmarker
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Booking apps with real-time availability checks and offline Room DB sync require measured performance budgets to avoid jank during calendar scrolling and map rendering

558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.name: Compliance Auditor
558dadd4-f06b-4741-aa5f-e71531457c6f.role: Handling Stripe, personal data across 5 locales, and photo uploads creates GDPR and PCI-DSS obligations that require a dedicated compliance audit before launch
